title: Starvation
subtitle: The first crisis of organized life

pages.text: The settlement's first government faced its first hard truth: a people can gather by chance, but a tribe must keep food coming by design.

The Starvation crisis asks for stored valid food: catches, harvests, and meat in claimed storage, safe from spoilage and poison. Hover the Town Hall food line to see how much food per second storage is contributing.
Fishers, farmers, and herders each supply storage differently. Your choice determines the objective path shown on the side tracker, but every path is solved by creating a stable stored-food rate.
